zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Hopton於1515年出生在英國史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素時，她的父親Edward Hopton26歲，母親Elizabeth Botterell22歲。她於1541年12月1日與Thomas Anderson結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年2月16日在英國米德萊可霍爾波恩聖 安德魯享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Hopton于1515年出生在英国史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素时，她的父亲Edward Hopton26岁，母亲Elizabeth Botterell22岁。她于1541年12月1日与Thomas Anderson结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1599年2月16日在英国米德萊可霍爾波恩聖 安德魯享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Hopton, such as those in Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Suffolk, from Old English hop ‘remote enclosed place’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Hopton was born in 1515, in Hopton Castle, Shropshire, England, her father, Edward Hopton, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Botterell, was 22. She married Thomas Anderson on 1 December 1541. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 16 February 1599, in St Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, England, at the age of 84.

Elle a épousé Thomas Anderson le 1 décembre 1541. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 février 1599, à St Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

ko.St Mildred Poultry with St Mary Colechur: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 미드러드 파우트리 위스 스트 메리 콜렉후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Hopton(이)가 1515년 영국 슈럽실르 홉턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Hopton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Botterell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1541년 12월 1일 Thomas Anderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 2월 16일 영국 미들레세스 홀본 스트 앤드루에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Hopton родилась в 1515 г. в местности хоптон кастл, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Hopton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Botterell, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Anderson 1 декабря 1541 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 февраля 1599 г. в местности ст андрю, холборн, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.
